description: Create an Incoming Webhook integration in Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) to allow external deployment notifications. Configure the integration with the name "CI/CD Pipeline", post to the "#release-updates" channel as "DeployBot", and use the ":rocket:" avatar emoji. Save the generated Webhook URL to /home/ga/webhook_url.txt. Send a test message via the webhook with the text "Build #1042 deployed to production successfully. Version: 8.1.0" using a JSON payload.

metadata.target_message: Build #1042 deployed to production successfully. Version: 8.1.0
